[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000110 3
1 0011011 4
2 1110000 3
3 0000111 3
4 0110110 4
5 1101111 6
6 1000110 3
7 0011011 4

12 21 0000000 a
23 32 0000010 1
34 43 0010000 1
45 54 0000000 a
56 65 0000110 2
67 76 0011110 4
70 07 0001000 1

02 20 0000000 a

24 42 1000000 1

60 06 0001000 1
71 17 0010000 1

03 30 0001000 1

50 05 0000000 a
61 16 0010000 1
72 27 1000110 3 match 0 6
